hooks.prompt: Hook-injected context does not survive context compaction. Silently re-read 06_Metadata/hot.md now to restore the hot cache. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,time,json; f='06_Metadata/hot.md'; age=time.time()-os.path.getmtime(f); exit(0) if age<600 else (print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'hot.md not updated — last updated '+str(int(age//60))+'m ago. Update it before ending session.'})) or exit(1))"
